title: Chinese Consumer Spending Has Improved But Further Contraction In Domestic Furniture Sales
section_path: Chinese Consumer Spending Has Improved But Further Contraction In Domestic Furniture Sales
section_path_text: Chinese Consumer Spending Has Improved But Further Contraction In Domestic Furniture Sales
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
China's retail sales in October grew year-on-year by 4.9%. This has marked a second consecutive month where growth has increased (one month prior in September, growth rose to 4.4%). Prior to September, China's retail sales growth had fallen for five consecutive months during April through August, and by August growth had fallen to only 2.5%.
